_meta.description: Sample output generated from sample case TKT-001

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. I meant to send it to 01712345678 but it went to 01719876543. Please help me get my money back.

output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to the wrong number (+8801719876543) via TXN-9101 at 14:08. The intended recipient was 01712345678. Transaction history confirms a completed 5000 BDT transfer to +8801719876543, consistent with the complaint.
output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer. Confirm the intended recipient number. If verified, initiate the dispute resolution process for a potential reversal through official channels. Check if the counterparty account can be contacted.
output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out regarding your transaction. We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101 involving 5000 BDT. Our dispute resolution team is reviewing your case. If any eligible resolution is applicable, it will be processed through official channels. For security, please never share your PIN, OTP, or password with anyone, including our support staff. We will update you on the progress shortly.
